sources.description: Official API documentation and models guide
MiniMax GitHub organization with 25+ repositories including M1, M2, M2.1, M2.7, M3 model implementations
HuggingFace organization with model weights for M2, M2.1, M2.5, M2.7, M3
Official news and press releases (2025-2026: M2.5 release, M3 launch, financial results)
MiniMax-01: Scaling Foundation Models with Lightning Attention (January 2025)
MiniMax-M1: Scaling Test-Time Compute Efficiently with Lightning Attention (June 2025)
Company blog with product updates and technical articles

key_findings.model_capabilities: Multimodal (text, image, video), 1M token context, coding and agentic tasks
key_findings.open_source_models: M2.1, M2.7, M3 available on GitHub and HuggingFace
key_findings.recent_funding: 2025 revenue $79M (158.9% YoY growth), targeting Shanghai IPO

sources.description: Official Moonshot AI website with product information
Kimi open platform with API documentation and developer resources
Moonshot AI GitHub organization with 38+ repositories including Kimi K2, K2.5, K2.6, Kimi-Dev
HuggingFace organization with Kimi K2, K2.5, K2.6, Kimi-Dev model weights and documentation
Kimi research blog with technical articles and model releases (K2.5, K2.6, Agent Swarm)
Kimi K2 repository with technical documentation (1T parameters, 32B activated, multimodal agentic model)

key_findings.model_capabilities: Multimodal (text, image, video), 1T parameters, agentic AI, code generation, agent swarms (300 sub-agents)
key_findings.open_source_models: Kimi K2, K2.5, K2.6, Kimi-Dev available on GitHub and HuggingFace
key_findings.strategic_direction: Desktop application (Kimi Work), IPO consideration on Hong Kong Stock Exchange (March 2026)
key_findings.market_reach: Strong backing from Alibaba, Tencent, Meituan, HongShan

metadata.search_strategy: WebSearch + WebFetch for official docs, GitHub, HuggingFace, news, research papers, blogs
